name: claude-kit
description: claude-kit — an autonomous, stack-agnostic SDLC for Claude Code, delivered as a plugin.

plugins.name: claude-kit
plugins.description: Autonomous SDLC for Claude Code + a project generator: scaffold a batteries-included React + FastAPI app, or run 24 specialized agents through spec → review → build → test → security → ship with quality gates, working memory, and a self-improving learnings loop.
